stemHtml: How does Microwave Landing Systems allow the aircraft to fix its position accurately in three dimensions? By means of:

options.a: Timing the interval between pulses in azimuth and elevation and timing the delay for pulses to reach the aircraft to define range.
options.b: Timing the passage of two scanning beams from transmitters co-located with DME.
options.c: Information from four satellites transmitting microwaves.
